title: Chicago, 1893: Shadows of the White City
premise: The player, assistant to Daniel Burnham, must uncover and stop a conspiracy to sabotage the World's Columbian Exposition before opening day.
openingSituation: A discrepancy in shipping manifests and an unnerving conversation overheard near the Administration Building suggest that someone is tampering with critical fair infrastructure.
goal: Identify the conspirators, confirm the method of sabotage, and stop it before public disaster or humiliation strikes the fair.

acts.name: Setup
beats: At least one suspect becomes visible

acts.name: Pressure
beats: A second suspect or complication emerges
Sabotage method or target becomes clearer

pressureEvents: A telegraph arrives with contradictory instructions
A guard reports movement near restricted electrical equipment
A newspaper man gets wind of a scandal

winConditions: The true sabotage method is identified
The player prevents or neutralizes the sabotage
Burnham or fair security accepts the player's warning in time
failConditions: Time expires before action is taken
The player accuses the wrong person and loses critical support
The sabotage succeeds sufficiently to damage the fair's opening or reputation
partialSuccessExamples: The immediate sabotage is stopped, but the conspirators escape
The fair opens safely, but scandal reaches the newspapers
Burnham is saved political embarrassment, but the player sacrifices an ally

scenario.player_role: Assistant to Daniel Burnham, Director of Works
scenario.motive: Sabotage the Westinghouse AC electrical demonstration to embarrass Chicago and benefit rival foreign interests

clues.title: Forged Initials on Shipping Memo
clues.description: A shipping authorization bears the same initials twice — in two distinct hands. Someone falsified access.

clues.title: Overheard French Exchange
clues.description: Near the Midway, a brief exchange in French cuts off at your approach. The words 'la démonstration' and 'demain soir' were unmistakable.

clues.title: Rerouted Electrical Crates
clues.description: Three crates of electrical switching equipment were diverted from Machinery Hall to an unlisted service depot under irregular paperwork.

clues.title: Bribed Night Watchman
clues.description: A freight yard watchman admits to accepting payment for looking away during after-hours deliveries, paid in cash by a well-dressed intermediary.

clues.title: Altered Wiring Diagrams
clues.description: The official schematics for the central lighting demonstration have been subtly altered — a change that would cause a cascade failure on activation.

clues.title: Note: Opening Night Lighting
clues.description: A handwritten note refers to the lighting demonstration as the moment of action — confirming a specific, timed sabotage target.
